2158320.name: Hellvivors Demo
2158320.description:
After being banned from heaven, you find yourself in hell. Surrounded by hellish creatures, you must survive hordes of demons and become the new Hell Lord.



  • 50+ cards to make your builds
  • 7+ characters to unlock
    [*12+ synergies to totally break the game and blow up your PC[/list]
      [*4 directions Automatic shooting[/list]
        [*Sacrifice hearts to obtain forbidden cards[/list]
          [*Survive for 20 minutes and face the wrath of the king of hell[/list]
            [*Gooooreeee, too much gore[/list]
2158320.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
